name: Trex
description: Trex is the world's largest manufacturer of wood-alternative decking and railing, known for sustainable composite decking made from 95% recycled materials.

name: TimberTech
description: TimberTech offers premium composite and PVC decking with unmatched real wood looks and industry-leading technology like Cool Touch and fire resistance.

name: Fiberon
description: Fiberon manufactures sustainable composite and PVC decking with high recycled content, offering a wide range of colors and price points.

name: Deckorators
description: Deckorators offers innovative composite decking with patented through-body color technology and wood-like aesthetics.

name: MoistureShield
description: MoistureShield is known for its solid core composite decking with superior moisture resistance and zero structural field failures for over 30 years.

name: Azek
description: Azek is the leading brand of premium PVC decking, offering the most realistic wood looks with superior moisture resistance and Class A fire ratings.
